As a go-in team, I wanted to show you how you can get this privacy policy template funnel into your account and how to make changes to it. So below this video we have a button. When you click on that button, it's going to take you to click funnels. If you need to sign in, it'll take you to a page like this. You'll hit member login at the top right. You'll sign in. Then it's going to take you to the shared funnels being processed page. As you saw, it shows a green progress bar letting you know if it's importing it. Once it gets to the end, you're going to see this complete view funnel. Go ahead and click on that view funnel so you can open up the funnel you just imported. So now we have our new funnel in our account and now it's open. We can start making changes to it. So once we get to this page, we're right now in the overview tab, we want to go ahead and click publishing on the right hand side and give it a better name. So I'm going to call this, this can be whatever you want. This is just for your reference. So if you look at the step, you know what it is. And then path is going to be the end part of your domain. So that is something that your clients are going to be able to see. You can only use letters, numbers, the dashes and underscores here. So give it a good unique name, something that describes what it is. And then once you get that typed in, only letters, numbers, dashes and underscores, copy it to your clipboard. So I selected all copied it and then hit the screen update funnel step button. If you notice it updated right there too. We need to change it a couple other spots. Also on this section where it shows that control and that has a preview of the page, that gear icon. Select everything that's in the path and paste it. Then the name do the same. Then click update page. One other thing we need to change before we go into the actual page is we need to go to settings at the top right. Where it shows path, I'm going to select it all and paste to replace it. And then I want to change my domain. So I want to pick my verified domain that I have connected with click funnels already. Now that that's good, I'm going to scroll down to the very bottom. Hit save and update settings. Now it's showing our domain and then the updated path. So we're ready to go ahead and start editing the page now. So go ahead and hit this edit page button right below the preview. You'll need to change the title up here at the top to be yours. You just click in there and you can edit right away. You'll put whatever your gym name is. Now inside the actual document, you notice there are a lot of sections that have these brackets around them. Those are sections that you need to update so it's unique for your business. Let's go ahead and hit this gear icon. So I moved my mouse over until I got the orange box. I'm going to hit the gear icon for settings. It opens this text block on the right hand side and I want to click open text. This lets me edit the actual text that's in here. So last updated, we can go ahead and change this. Upset URL. Company name. Now I'm not going to go through all of the different sections you need to update. There are quite a few but you want to take your time. Go through this entire document. Make sure you understand the wording that's in here. And then find the sections that need to be updated for your specific business and these brackets and update it to whatever is for your business. And once you're done with that, you've updated all of these sections. You want to click this blue update button. Now at the very bottom of this page, we also have a all rights reserved so you want to click in there and you want to change that company name to your company name. And one other section, once you've updated the title, you've updated all of these brackets and fields inside the actual privacy policy. You've updated that all rights reserved section. You want to go to settings at the top and then SEO metadata. You want to change the page title too. That looks good. I'm going to go ahead and hit save. I always like to save twice for good measure. I'm going to hit this preview button. That way I can preview my changes, make sure that I got everything changed I needed to and I can see what the page is actually going to look like. That looks great. So I'm going to go ahead and close that out. I'm going to hit this exit arrow right there. Now that link right there, that goes to your privacy policy. Whenever you're doing your advertisements, other funnels, and you need to include or link your privacy policy, you now can point it to that link. So if you have a tracking document, you may want to copy that and put it there so that way you can find it quickly. Or you can always come back to this click funnel and get it from that same spot too. Well, I hope you enjoyed this video. Keep in mind that everything in the above video about this being a sample funnel, that it's just for US businesses and that you need to have it reviewed by your own legal counsel to make sure it meets the needs of your unique business, it applies to this one too. Let us know if you have any questions and I hope you have a great rest of your day.
